query: Find 10 parcels larger than 5000 m² in Drammen municipality, sorted by parcel area descending.

2.description: select top 10 parcels (teig) in Drammen with area > 5000 m2 ordered by area desc

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry) AS area_from_geom_m2 FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND (lagretberegnetareal > 5000 OR ST_Area(omrade::geometry) > 5000) ORDER BY COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) DESC LIMIT 10;
